smoke.detail: pixi run pytest tests/test_phase1_integration.py -q: 11 passed. Full fast tier (tests/ -m 'not model'): 159 passed, 2 deselected.

note: Phase-1 gate green: rdkit_crippen + pksmart conform to the registry contract, folder template, and uniform CLI; dispatch validates/ledgers both; run_endpoint selects each; pksmart fold-error round-trips Uncertainty. t10/t11 both DONE in state.
